title: Art History OOTD Studies
description: Four independent outfit-grid studies translating different public-domain painting archetypes into modern fashion editorials without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Independent structured-layout studies: each image uses a different art-history visual language, keeps the painted-head illusion, and tests whether a social-feed OOTD composition can stay clear without readable UI text.

en.title: Art History OOTD Studies
en.description: Four independent outfit-grid studies translating different public-domain painting archetypes into modern fashion editorials without reference dependencies.

zh-CN.title: 艺术史 OOTD 单图研究
zh-CN.description: 四张独立图把不同公共领域名画类型转译为现代穿搭编辑版式，不依赖参考图。
